commands.author: Takhoffman
commands.repair_reason: automerge enabled; CHANGELOG.md entry is required before automerge; dispatch a focused changelog repair

target.title: fix(channels): suppress late raw tool output
target.body:
## Summary
- Keeps failed tool-call status visible through compact progress/item callbacks for message-tool-only channel replies, while suppressing raw text-only failed tool-result payloads that were escaping as separate messages.
- Stops Telegram and Discord progress drafts/tool payloads from accepting late text-only updates after the final answer has been delivered.
- Tightens the review-found edge cases: only send-like messaging tool actions count as visible delivery, async item progress cannot race late command output, and Telegram media-only finals now close the late-tool-output gate too.
- Preserves media tool results and exec approval payloads so real attachment/approval flows are not hidden by the suppression.

## Root Cause
Before/RCA proof:
- Parent-source proof: before this patch, `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts` suppressed default tool progress only when `!hasMedia && !hasExecApproval && deliveryPayload.isError !== true`. Exact inspection command: `git show HEAD^:src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts | sed -n '1615,1675p'`. That condition explicitly let text-only failed tool results bypass the compact-progress suppression path.
- Regression trigger proof: `57da466ecbb5f63b5a1881ae8caa7359c02ec40c` (`Fix Discord verbose tool progress delivery (#80042)`, merged May 17, 2026) changed source-suppressed verbose progress from direct-chat-only to `sourceReplyDeliveryMode === "message_tool_only"`. That correctly restored compact verbose progress for channel replies, but it also made the older `isError` bypass visible in Telegram/Discord message-tool-only turns.
- Late-tail proof: Discord's generic fallback final-delivery branch marked the reply sent but did not mark the draft preview as final-delivered, while Telegram's tool/progress paths accepted text-only tool updates after the answer lane was finalized. That let asynchronous failed command output update or restart progress after the final chat message.
- Review proof: `codex -s danger-full-access -a never --disable plugins review --commit HEAD` completed after the initial skill sandbox failure. It found three P2 regressions in this patch: media-only Telegram finals, non-send message actions, and async item-event ordering. Those findings were accepted and fixed in `7b76ed87e0eb4d72a13b60921b2cda30e684dda7`.
- Scope proof: the leak is shared dispatch/subscription behavior plus Telegram and Discord adapter finalization, not a Telegram-only issue.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Failed tool calls still appear in compact progress state, but raw failed tool-output text no longer dumps after the final Telegram/Discord channel reply.

Real environment tested: Local tmp worktree branch `fix-channel-late-tool-output` at `7b76ed87e0eb4d72a13b60921b2cda30e684dda7` on `origin/main` `d0f7c8fa280534c3be786fd1ec69b569bbd72200`; screenshot proof came from a Telegram DM after running the fix live. Private channel/session identifiers from the original report are intentionally redacted or omitted.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~2..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts`
- `codex -s danger-full-access -a never --disable plugins review --commit HEAD`

Evidence after fix:
- `oxfmt`: `All matched files use the correct format. Finished in 41ms on 13 files using 1 threads.`
- `git diff --check HEAD~2..HEAD`: no output.
- Vitest: `Test Files 6 passed (6); Tests 400 passed (400); Duration 10.95s`.
- Codex review: completed and produced three P2 findings; all three accepted findings are fixed by the second commit.
- Screenshot artifact: ![Telegram DM after-fix proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VACInc/openclaw/pr-proof-84178/pr-proof/84178/telegram-after-fix-tool-output.jpg)
- Screenshot observed behavior: the intentionally failed tool call is represented as compact tool/status output before the assistant response, followed by the final chat response; no raw failed tool dump appears after the final response.
- New shared dispatch coverage proves `onCommandOutput` still receives compact failed `exec` status while raw `sendToolResult` does not receive `raw failed command output` in `message_tool_only` mode.
- New embedded subscription coverage proves text-only tool summaries after committed message-tool delivery are suppressed.
- New Discord coverage proves the progress draft shows pre-final compact `Exec` state and is not updated by late failed command output after final delivery.
- New Telegram coverage proves post-final text-only tool payloads are suppressed, media-only final replies suppress late text-only tool output, and command-output callbacks do not restart progress drafts after the final answer.
- New non-regression coverage proves `message` tool `action="read"` does not count as visible reply delivery and therefore does not suppress later compact progress.

Observed result after fix: Compact failed-tool progress remains available before/finalizing the answer, and late raw text-only failed tool payloads are dropped after final delivery; media payloads, message-tool reads, and exec approval payloads keep their intended behavior.

What was not tested: A fresh live Discord E2E posting with a real Discord account/channel was not run from this tmp worktree. The Telegram proof uses a live DM screenshot; the original reported topic/session identifiers were not included in this public PR.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 <13 touched files>`
- `git diff --check HEAD~2..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts`
- `codex -s danger-full-access -a never --disable plugins review --commit HEAD`

## What was not tested
A fresh live Discord E2E posting with a real Discord account/channel was not run; this PR uses source-level RCA plus focused shared, Discord, Telegram, Codex-review, and live Telegram DM screenshot proof as the evidence path.
target.author: vacinc
